verdict: A comfortable and well-paced Easy chart that matches the song's energy perfectly, marred only by a couple of overly demanding eighth-note jump transitions.

issues.problem: Jarring 8th-note transition from JUMP LR to HOLD U at 69.242, which is too physically demanding for an Easy chart.
An 8th-note transition from tap U to JUMP LR at 76.620 creates a sudden difficulty spike for beginner players.
